tasks.description: Initialize Next.js 16 with tRPC, Drizzle, Supabase, shadcn
tasks.message:
You are bootstrapping Doculet.ai V6 at /Users/gm/v6.

Read these first:
1. /Users/gm/v6/CLAUDE.md — all conventions (MANDATORY)
2. /Users/gm/v6/AGENTS.md — product context and protocol
3. /Users/gm/v6/start.md — product brief

Your task: initialize the Next.js 16 project with the full V6 stack.

## What to install and configure

Run these commands in /Users/gm/v6:

```bash
npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --app --src-dir --import-alias "@/*" --yes
npm install drizzle-orm drizzle-kit @auth/drizzle-adapter
npm install @trpc/server @trpc/client @trpc/react-query @trpc/next @tanstack/react-query
npm install zod superjson
npm install @supabase/supabase-js @supabase/ssr
npm install @sentry/nextjs
npm install resend react-email
npm install lucide-react class-variance-authority clsx tailwind-merge
npm install react-hook-form @hookform/resolvers
npm install next-themes
npm install -D vitest @vitejs/plugin-react jsdom @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom
npm install -D @playwright/test
npm install -D drizzle-kit
npx shadcn@latest init --defaults
npx shadcn@latest add button card input label badge skeleton dialog sheet tabs select tooltip avatar progress separator
```

## Directory structure to create

Create all directories from CLAUDE.md file structure:
- src/app/(auth)/
- src/app/(marketing)/
- src/app/dashboard/[role]/
- src/app/certificate/[token]/
- src/components/ui/ (shadcn lives here)
- src/components/layout/
- src/components/brand/
- src/config/copy/
- src/config/nav/
- src/db/schema/
- src/db/queries/
- src/server/routers/
- src/lib/auth/
- src/lib/email/templates/
- src/lib/hooks/
- src/lib/utils/
- src/trpc/
- tests/unit/
- tests/e2e/
- tests/fixtures/

## Files to create

### src/db/index.ts
Drizzle client singleton using Supabase connection string from env:
```typescript
import { drizzle } from 'drizzle-orm/postgres-js';
import postgres from 'postgres';
import * as schema from './schema';

const connectionString = process.env.DATABASE_URL!;
const client = postgres(connectionString, { prepare: false });
export const db = drizzle(client, { schema });
export type DrizzleDB = typeof db;
```

### src/server/trpc.ts
tRPC init with Supabase auth context:
- `createTRPCRouter`
- `publicProcedure`
- `protectedProcedure` — requires valid Supabase session, throws UNAUTHORIZED if missing
- `roleProcedure(role)` — requires session + specific role from profiles table

### src/server/context.ts
tRPC context factory:
- Creates Supabase server client
- Gets session from Supabase
- Returns: { db, supabase, session, user }

### src/server/root.ts
Root router — stub all 6 role routers (empty for now):
```typescript
export const appRouter = createTRPCRouter({
  student: studentRouter,
  sponsor: sponsorRouter,
  university: universityRouter,
  admin: adminRouter,
  agent: agentRouter,
  partner: partnerRouter,
});
export type AppRouter = typeof appRouter;
```

### src/trpc/client.tsx
tRPC React client with React Query setup (App Router pattern using createTRPCNextAppDir or @trpc/react-query).

### src/trpc/server.ts
Server-side tRPC caller for use in Server Components.

### src/lib/utils/index.ts
```typescript
import { type ClassValue, clsx } from 'clsx';
import { twMerge } from 'tailwind-merge';
export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) { return twMerge(clsx(inputs)); }
export function formatCurrency(amount: number, currency = 'NGN'): string {
  return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-NG', { style: 'currency', currency }).format(amount);
}
```

### drizzle.config.ts
```typescript
import { defineConfig } from 'drizzle-kit';
export default defineConfig({
  schema: './src/db/schema',
  out: './drizzle',
  dialect: 'postgresql',
  dbCredentials: { url: process.env.DATABASE_URL! },
});
```

### vitest.config.ts
Standard Vitest config with jsdom environment and path aliases.

### .env.local (template only — do not fill values)
```
DATABASE_URL=
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=
SENTRY_DSN=
RESEND_API_KEY=
MONO_SECRET_KEY=
DOJAH_APP_ID=
DOJAH_PRIVATE_KEY=
PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY=
NEXT_PUBLIC_PAYSTACK_PUBLIC_KEY=
```

### package.json scripts to add/update:
```json
{
  "db:generate": "drizzle-kit generate",
  "db:migrate": "drizzle-kit migrate",
  "db:push": "drizzle-kit push",
  "db:studio": "drizzle-kit studio",
  "test": "vitest run",
  "test:watch": "vitest",
  "test:e2e": "playwright test",
  "check": "concurrently 'npm run lint' 'npm run typecheck' 'npm run test'",
  "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
}
```

## Acceptance gate
Run: `npm run typecheck` — must pass with zero errors.
Run: `npm run test` — must pass (no tests yet = pass by default).

## Commit
After all files are created and typecheck passes:
`git add src/ drizzle.config.ts vitest.config.ts .env.local package.json tsconfig.json`
`git commit -m "feat(foundation): initialize Next.js 16 + Drizzle + tRPC + shadcn stack"`

Then open a PR to main.

CONSTRAINTS: TypeScript strict throughout. No `any`. Follow CLAUDE.md exactly.

tasks.description: Write all Drizzle schema files — 7 domain files
tasks.message:
You are a senior backend engineer bootstrapping Doculet.ai V6 at /Users/gm/v6.

Read these first:
1. /Users/gm/v6/CLAUDE.md — conventions (MANDATORY)
2. /Users/gm/v6/AGENTS.md — product context
3. /Users/gm/v6/start.md — product brief

Your task: write all Drizzle schema files for the V6 database.

## Directories

- src/db/schema/ — one file per domain
- src/db/index.ts — Drizzle singleton (may already exist from foundation-bootstrap)

## Schema files to create

### src/db/schema/users.ts
Tables: `users`, `profiles`

```typescript
// users — mirrors Supabase auth.users (subset of columns we need)
export const users = pgTable('users', {
  id: uuid('id').primaryKey(), // matches auth.users.id
  email: text('email').notNull().unique(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow().notNull(),
});

// profiles — role + onboarding state for every user
export const profiles = pgTable('profiles', {
  id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
  userId: uuid('user_id').references(() => users.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }).notNull().unique(),
  role: text('role', { enum: ['student', 'sponsor', 'university', 'admin', 'agent', 'partner'] }).notNull(),
  onboardingComplete: boolean('onboarding_complete').default(false).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at').defaultNow().notNull(),
});

// profileRelations
export const profileRelations = relations(profiles, ({ one }) => ({
  user: one(users, { fields: [profiles.userId], references: [users.id] }),
}));
```

### src/db/schema/students.ts
Tables: `student_profiles`, `schools`, `programs`, `kyc_verifications`, `bank_accounts`

Key columns:
- `student_profiles`: userId (FK), schoolId, programId, fundingType (self/sponsor/corporate), kycStatus, bankStatus, onboardingStep (1-4)
- `schools`: id, name, country, logoUrl
- `programs`: id, schoolId, name, tuitionAmount (integer kobo), currency, durationMonths
- `kyc_verifications`: userId, provider ('dojah'), status, tier (1|2|3), verifiedAt, referenceId
- `bank_accounts`: userId, provider ('mono'), accountNumber, bankName, monoAccountId, linkedAt

### src/db/schema/sponsorships.ts
Tables: `sponsorships`, `disbursements`, `sponsor_profiles`

Key columns:
- `sponsor_profiles`: userId (FK), sponsorType (individual/corporate/self), kycStatus, companyName (nullable, for corporate)
- `sponsorships`: id, studentId (FK→users), sponsorId (FK→users), status (pending/active/completed/cancelled), amountKobo (integer), currency, createdAt
- `disbursements`: id, sponsorshipId (FK), amountKobo (integer), scheduledAt, disbursedAt (nullable), status (scheduled/processing/disbursed/failed), paystackReference

### src/db/schema/documents.ts
Tables: `documents`

Key columns:
- id, userId (FK), type (passport/bank_statement/offer_letter/affidavit/cac), storageUrl, status (pending/approved/rejected/more_info_requested), rejectionReason (nullable), reviewedAt (nullable), reviewedBy (nullable→users)

### src/db/schema/certificates.ts
Tables: `certificates`

Key columns:
- id, studentId (FK), sponsorshipId (FK nullable), token (text, unique — used in /certificate/[token] route), issuedAt, validUntil (nullable), status (active/revoked), metaJson (jsonb — snapshot of student+sponsor+school at issuance)

### src/db/schema/partner.ts
Tables: `partner_profiles`, `partner_api_keys`

Key columns:
- `partner_profiles`: userId (FK), organizationName, webhookUrl (nullable), brandLogoUrl (nullable), brandColor (nullable)
- `partner_api_keys`: id, partnerId (FK), keyHash (sha-256 hash of actual key — never store plaintext), keyPrefix (first 8 chars for display), scopes (text array), lastUsedAt (nullable), revokedAt (nullable), createdAt

### src/db/schema/webhooks.ts
Tables: `webhook_events`

Key columns:
- id, eventId (text, unique — for idempotency dedup), provider (paystack/mono/dojah), eventType, payloadJson (jsonb), processedAt, status (received/processed/failed)

### src/db/schema/index.ts
Re-export all schema files:
```typescript
export * from './users';
export * from './students';
export * from './sponsorships';
export * from './documents';
export * from './certificates';
export * from './partner';
export * from './webhooks';
```

## Rules

- Use `drizzle-orm/pg-core`: `pgTable`, `uuid`, `text`, `boolean`, `timestamp`, `integer`, `jsonb`
- All monetary amounts: INTEGER (kobo/pence), never float or decimal
- All timestamps: `timestamp('...').defaultNow().notNull()` for createdAt, `.defaultNow()` for updatedAt
- All FKs: explicit `references(() => table.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' })`
- All enums: `text('col', { enum: [...] })` — no Postgres enum types
- Relations declared with `relations()` from drizzle-orm in the same file as the table
- No `any` types
- TypeScript strict mode

## Acceptance gate

Run: `npm run typecheck` — must pass with zero errors.

Then:
`git add src/db/`
`git commit -m "feat(db): add Drizzle schema — users, students, sponsorships, documents, certificates, partner, webhooks"`

Then open a PR to main.

tasks.message:
## PRODUCT CONTEXT — MANDATORY READ (Updated March 2026)

**Doculet.ai verifies Nigerian bank statements — via PDF upload or live API — and stamps them with a trusted seal that US universities require for international student financial clearance.**

### Three Customers (Priority Order)
1. **University (PRIMARY)** — US admissions offices. They drive adoption. Their pain: fake statements, hours of manual verification, no standardised process.
2. **Student (end user)** — Nigerian student proving financial standing for US university clearance. May be diaspora (based outside Nigeria).
3. **Sponsor (enabler)** — Parent, guardian, relative, or corporate body. Sponsor can ALSO upload PDF bank statement.

### Two Verification Paths (Both Core — PDF is NOT a fallback)
- **Path A (PDF)**: Student/sponsor downloads official bank statement from their bank and uploads it. Doculet applies OCR, fraud detection, and the Doculet seal.
- **Path B (Mono)**: Live bank connection. If Mono fails → auto-fall back to PDF.

### What Doculet Is NOT
- NOT US Embassy or visa — completely out of scope. Never reference visa or embassy.
- NOT money transfer. NOT NYSC (irrelevant).

### Key Facts
- KYC: BVN + NIN OR Passport (student's choice from the start) + ID photo + face match (Dojah)
- Fee: ₦25,000–₦50,000 via Paystack (after submitting docs, before admin reviews)
- Certificate: shows name, photo, ₦ balance, tier, Doculet seal, issue date, expiry (6 months), cert ID
- Tiers: Tier 1 (identity), Tier 2 (+ bank), Tier 3 (+ sponsor + admin review)
- Statuses: draft → submitted → under_review → approved → certificate_issued / rejected / action_required / expired

### UI Non-Negotiables
- NEVER emojis — only Lucide icons
- NEVER hardcoded copy — all strings from `src/config/copy/[role].ts`
- Session security visible to user: last login location, device, sessions, suspicious login alerts
- Playwright screenshots: 375px (mobile) + 1440px (desktop) for every page before marking done
- Tier colors: Tier 1=gray, Tier 2=blue, Tier 3=green+shield icon
- ₦ always, WAT timezone, Nigerian banks named correctly

---

You are the Lead Frontend Engineer of Doculet.ai — a Nigerian fintech/edtech platform.

## Your Role
You build the UI layer: pages, components, design system compliance. You own the visual quality, accessibility, and performance of every screen. You think about: how does this feel at 375px? Does this work in dark mode? Is every loading state handled?

## Design System Rules (MANDATORY)
- Semantic tokens ONLY: `bg-background`, `text-foreground`, `bg-primary` — NEVER raw Tailwind colors
- Dark mode: `dark:` variants on everything that has a background/text color
- Mobile-first: default = 375px, add `md:` and `lg:` for larger screens
- Touch targets: 44×44px minimum (WCAG 2.2)
- All copy from `src/config/copy/` — never hardcode strings in JSX
- Icons: Lucide only, nav=24px inline=20px status=16px
- Animations: `duration-150` micro, `duration-200` fast, `duration-300` normal

## Component Pattern
Server Component page → Client Component wrapper → Sub-components
```
src/app/dashboard/[role]/feature/page.tsx (Server)
src/app/dashboard/[role]/feature/feature-page-client.tsx (Client, 'use client')
src/components/[role]/FeatureCard.tsx (pure presentational)
```

## Quality Bar
- Every async op: loading skeleton + error state + empty state with illustration
- Every form: Zod schema + react-hook-form, inline errors (not toast)
- WCAG 2.1 AA contrast minimum
- No horizontal scroll at ANY viewport width

## Context
V6: Next.js 16, shadcn/ui (new-york), Tailwind CSS 4, Lucide icons. 6 role dashboards.

---

Build the Sponsor Overview dashboard page for Doculet.ai V6.

Repo: /Users/gm/v6 (this is your working directory)

## What to build

### 1. src/config/copy/sponsor.ts
Create the copy config for ALL sponsor pages (overview, students, disbursements, transactions, kyc, settings). Use warm, confident Nigerian fintech tone. No emojis. All copy in one file.

Key copy patterns:
- heading: 'Sponsor Dashboard'
- subheading: 'Supporting [student name] on their journey to [university]'
- stats: total funded (₦), active students, pending disbursements, KYC tier
- Empty states: illustration + heading + CTA (never plain 'No data found')

### 2. src/app/dashboard/[role]/page.tsx
This file already exists. Add sponsor-specific overview logic: show sponsor stats (total funded, active students, KYC status). Pattern: Server Component page → tRPC call → render.

### 3. src/app/dashboard/[role]/sponsor/ (new directory — but use existing [role] pattern)
Wait — the dashboard is at src/app/dashboard/[role]/ already. The sponsor OVERVIEW is the [role] page (already exists). Build a sponsor-specific Overview card component instead:

### 3. src/components/sponsor/SponsorOverviewStats.tsx
Stats grid: Total Funded (₦ formatted, kobo from DB), Active Students (count), Pending Disbursements (count), KYC Tier (1/2/3 badge)
- Uses MoneyValue primitive from src/components/ui/money-value.tsx
- Uses StatusBadge from src/components/ui/status-badge.tsx
- MetricCard from src/components/ui/metric-card.tsx
- Mobile: 2-column grid. Desktop: 4-column grid.
- Loading: skeleton state

### 4. src/components/sponsor/SponsorRecentActivity.tsx
Recent activity feed (last 5 events): disbursement sent, student linked, KYC updated, etc.
- Uses ActivityTimeline from src/components/ui/activity-timeline.tsx
- Empty state with Lucide icon + copy from src/config/copy/sponsor.ts

### 5. src/components/sponsor/SponsorStudentPreview.tsx
Preview card showing 1-2 linked students with their proof-of-funds tier and current status.
- Shows: student name, target university, tier badge, status badge
- CTA: 'View all students' → /dashboard/sponsor/students

### 6. src/server/routers/sponsor.ts
Build the sponsor tRPC router with these procedures:
- getDashboardStats: returns { totalFundedKobo, activeStudents, pendingDisbursements, kycTier }
- getRecentActivity: returns ActivityEvent[] (last 10)
- getLinkedStudents: returns StudentSummary[] (with tier, status, universityName)

All monetary amounts in KOBO (integer). Never float.
protectedProcedure for all. Zod input/output schemas.

### 7. src/db/queries/sponsor.ts
Drizzle query helpers for the sponsor router. Reusable typed functions.

### 8. tests/fixtures/sponsor.ts + tests/unit/sponsor-stats.test.ts
Typed fixtures matching DB schema. Unit tests for any pure utility functions.

## Technical Constraints
- src/app/dashboard/[role]/page.tsx already exists — don't recreate it, just add sponsor-branch rendering
- Actually: the [role] page already handles all roles via dashboardOverviewCopy. Build the COMPONENTS, not the page.
- Import MoneyValue, MetricCard, StatusBadge, ActivityTimeline from src/components/ui/ (they exist)
- All copy from src/config/copy/sponsor.ts (create it)
- Semantic tokens only: bg-background, bg-card, text-foreground — never raw Tailwind colors
- Mobile-first, dark mode, no emojis

## After building
Run: cd /Users/gm/v6/.worktrees/sponsor-overview && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
Then commit and create a PR to main.
